texto: loved him with my eyes closed and my heart wide-open. And, when my naked soul saw his for the first time--it was like looking into a mirror. I recognized myself, in him, in an instant. It were as though my own reflection was staring back at me. There was nowhere to run, nowhere to hide; for, our souls had shared the same hiding place. I had loved his soul, first.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Denise Stark: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “loved him with my eyes closed and my heart wide-open. And, when my naked soul saw his for the fir…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love-quotes-and-sayings, soul pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de soul.
